name: Venafi
description: This app integrates with an instance of Venafi to perform generic and investigative actions

actions.name: List Policies
actions.description: Returns a list of all policies in Venafi

parameters.name: policy_dn
parameters.description: The folder DN for the new certificate

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The Common Name (CN) field for the certificate. Either the subject or object_name parameter must be filled in

parameters.name: object_name
parameters.description: The Common Name (CN) field for the certificate. Either the subject or object_name parameter must be filled in

parameters.name: approvers
parameters.description: An array of one or more identities for certificate workflow approvers

parameters.name: cadn
parameters.description: The Distinguished Name (DN) of the Trust Protection Platform Certificate Authority Template object

parameters.name: ca_specific_attributes
parameters.description: An array of name/value pairs providing any CA attributes to be stored with the Certificate object and submitted to the CA during enrollment

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: Locality/City attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: contacts
parameters.description: An array of one or more identities for users or groups who receive notifications about events pertaining to the object

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: The Country field for the certificate Subject DN

parameters.name: created_by
parameters.description: The setting to identify the object that initiated enrollment or provisioning changes

parameters.name: devices
parameters.description: An array of devices that require enrollment or provisioning

parameters.name: disable_automatic_renewal
parameters.description: The setting to control whether manual intervention is required for certificate renewal

parameters.name: elliptical_curve
parameters.description: P256, P384, or P521 encryption for Elliptical Curve Cryptography

parameters.name: key_algorithm
parameters.description: Algorithm for public key of Certificate

parameters.name: key_bit_size
parameters.description: The number of bits to allow for key generation

parameters.name: management_type
parameters.description: The level of management that Trust Protection Platform applies to the certificate

parameters.name: organization
parameters.description: Organization attribute of the certificate

parameters.name: organizational_unit
parameters.description: Organizational unit attribute of the certificate

parameters.name: pkcs10
parameters.description: The PKCS10 formatted CSR for the certificate

parameters.name: reenable
parameters.description: Option to renew a previously disabled certificate

parameters.name: set_work_to_do
parameters.description: Option to control certificate processing

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State/Province attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: subject_alt_names
parameters.description: Skip parameter if the policy already specifies SAN Types. Array of subject alternative names (SANS) for the certificate. For each SAN, specify an array element with a Type and a corresponding Name. For example, SubjectAltNames:[ {Type:2, Name:www.example.com}, {Type:7, Name:122.122.122.122} ]. The Type parameter is an integer that represents the kind of SAN which can be 0:OtherName, 1: Email, 2:DNS, 6: URI, or 7:IPAddress. The Name value is the SAN Friendly name that corresponds to the Type parameter

actions.name: List Certificates
actions.description: Returns a list of certificates in Venafi

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of certificates to return. Possible values are 1-100

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip (offset=5 begins results at page five)

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Country attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: common_name
parameters.description: Common name attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: key_algorithm
parameters.description: Algorithm for public key of Certificate

parameters.name: key_size
parameters.description: Public key size of Certificate

parameters.name: key_size_greater
parameters.description: Find certificates with a key size greater than the specified value

parameters.name: key_size_less
parameters.description: Find certificates with a key size less than the specified value

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: Locality/City attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: organization
parameters.description: Organization attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: organization_unit
parameters.description: Organization unit attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State/Province attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: san_dns
parameters.description: Subject Alternative Name (SAN) Distinguished Name Server (DNS) attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: san_email
parameters.description: Subject Alternative Name (SAN) Email RFC822 attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: san_ip
parameters.description: Subject Alternative Name (SAN) IP Address attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: san_upn
parameters.description: Subject Alternative Name (SAN) User Principle Name (UPN) attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: san_uri
parameters.description: Subject Alternative Name (SAN) Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: serial
parameters.description: Serial number attribute of Certificate

parameters.name: signature_algorithm
parameters.description: Algorithm used to sign the Certificate

parameters.name: thumbprint
parameters.description: SHA-1 thumbprint of the Certificate

parameters.name: valid_from
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmmmZ (Find certificates by the date of issue)

parameters.name: valid_to
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmmmZ (Find certificates by expiration date)

parameters.name: valid_to_greater
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmmmZ (Find certificates that expire after a certain date)

parameters.name: valid_to_less
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmmmZ (Find certificates that expire before a certain date)

actions.name: Renew Certificate
actions.description: Requests immediate renewal for an existing certificate in Venafi

parameters.name: certificate_dn
parameters.description: The Distinguished Name (DN) of the certificate to renew

parameters.name: pkcs10
parameters.description: The PKCS10 formatted CSR to use for the renewal

parameters.name: reenable
parameters.description: Option to renew a previously disabled certificate

actions.name: Revoke Certificate
actions.description: Requests to revoke an existing certificate in Venafi

parameters.name: certificate_dn
parameters.description: The Distinguished Name (DN) of the certificate to revoke

parameters.name: thumbprint
parameters.description: The thumbprint (hash) of the certificate to revoke

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: The reason for revocation of the certificate. 0: None, 1: User key compromised, 2: CA key compromised, 3: User changed affiliation, 4: Certificate superseded, 5: Original use no longer valid

parameters.name: comments
parameters.description: Details about why the certificate is being revoked

parameters.name: disable
parameters.description: The setting to manage the certificate upon revocation. If true, the certificate is disabled and no new certificate may replace it. If false, the certificate is allowed to be replaced by a new certificate

actions.name: Get Certificate
actions.description: Downloads specified certificate to the vault

parameters.name: certificate_dn
parameters.description: The Distinguished Name (DN) of the certificate to download

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The certificate format for the return data

parameters.name: friendly_name
parameters.description: The label or alias to use for Base64, JKS, or PKCS #12 formats. Required for the JKS format

parameters.name: include_chain
parameters.description: When the Format is Base64, PKCS #7, PKCS #12, or JKS, you can include the parent or root chain in the return data

parameters.name: include_private_key
parameters.description: When the Format is Base64, PKCS #12, or JKS, you can specify whether to return the private key

parameters.name: keystore_password
parameters.description: If the Format is JKS, you must set a keystore password. Use the same requirements as required for the Password parameter

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: If the IncludePrivateKey value is true, you must create a password. Password must be 12 characters and comprised of at least 3 of the following: uppercase alphabetic letters, lowercase alphabetic letters, numeric characters, special characters

parameters.name: root_first_order
parameters.description: The order of the certificate chain to trust
